result:
# Introducing Smart Drafts

We've all been there: a fresh document, a blinking cursor, and a quiet little dread. Blank pages are where good ideas go to stall. We built **Smart Drafts** because we kept hearing the same thing from you — the hardest part of writing isn't the writing, it's starting. So we set out to make that first move feel less like a leap and more like a nudge.

Here's how it works. Open a new document, give it a title, and click **Smart Draft**. We'll generate a tailored outline in seconds, drawing on your title and the recent context of what you've been working on — related docs, threads, and notes you already have permission to see. The result is a structured starting point you can keep, edit, or throw out entirely. It's not meant to write *for* you; it's meant to get you off zero so you can do what you do best.

This is just the first step. Next up: **custom voice training**, so Smart Drafts don't just sound coherent — they sound like *you*, or like your team. We're rolling that out in the coming months, and we'd love your feedback as we shape it. Try Smart Drafts today from any new document, and let us know what you build with it.

We've all been there: a fresh document, a blinking cursor, and a quiet little dread. Blank pages are where good ideas go to stall. We built **Smart Drafts** because we kept hearing the same thing from you — the hardest part of writing isn't the writing, it's starting. So we set out to make that first move feel less like a leap and more like a nudge.

Here's how it works. Open a new document, give it a title, and click **Smart Draft**. We'll generate a tailored outline in seconds, drawing on your title and the recent context of what you've been working on — related docs, threads, and notes you already have permission to see. The result is a structured starting point you can keep, edit, or throw out entirely. It's not meant to write *for* you; it's meant to get you off zero so you can do what you do best.

This is just the first step. Next up: **custom voice training**, so Smart Drafts don't just sound coherent — they sound like *you*, or like your team. We're rolling that out in the coming months, and we'd love your feedback as we shape it. Try Smart Drafts today from any new document, and let us know what you build with it.
